comment: Synthetic showcase case. Demonstrates advanced basal cell carcinoma where systemic hedgehog inhibition is appropriate because curative surgery/radiation are not feasible.

findings.primary_site: right medial canthus and nasal sidewall
findings.disease_extent: multifocal Gorlin syndrome-associated BCC with orbital-adjacent recurrent laBCC
findings.radiation_inappropriate_reason: Gorlin syndrome with high risk of radiation-induced BCCs and unacceptable orbital morbidity
prior_local_therapy: Mohs surgery for separate facial lesions
